title: Startup Go Camp: Documented educational excellence
summary: The Duke Kunshan University article provides comprehensive documentation of SGC's structure, methodology, and impact, including the exceptional 90.4/100 student rating.

comparativeBeats.label: Course structure
comparativeBeats.text: 6-week intensive covering entrepreneurial basics, market demand, user research, MVP development, business strategy, team management, and financing.

comparativeBeats.label: Teaching methodology
comparativeBeats.text: Combines classic business cases (like Facebook's startup story) with personal entrepreneurial experience, plus 4-hour weekly Office Hours for high-quality student interaction.

comparativeBeats.label: Student outcomes
comparativeBeats.text: 90.4/100 satisfaction rating, with many students continuing to build their projects after course completion. Strong freshman participation indicating early entrepreneurial engagement.

title: The philosophy of early building and unconventional paths
summary: Kehan Dong's personal website and public statements articulate a clear philosophy: supporting people who start building earlier than they're supposed to, focusing on unconventional paths and long-term agency.

comparativeBeats.label: Investment focus
comparativeBeats.text: Angel investing in early-stage founders who take unconventional paths, before they're 'supposed to' start building.

comparativeBeats.label: Educational approach
comparativeBeats.text: Creating environments where people can discover what they're capable of early, through programs like SGC and Inner Journey.

comparativeBeats.label: Systems thinking
comparativeBeats.text: Building integrated systems around early founders, education, and long-term agency through investing, writing, and program development.

title: Inner Journey: 1000+ lives transformed
summary: The Inner Journey program represents 25+ years of experience in transformational work with founders and leaders, focusing on conscious growth and inner alignment.

comparativeBeats.label: Program foundation
comparativeBeats.text: Based on ancient wisdom with a holistic and measurable approach to conscious leadership development.

comparativeBeats.label: Three-phase journey
comparativeBeats.text: From outer achievement to inner alignment, from self-mastery to conscious leadership, and from doing to being.

comparativeBeats.label: Documented impact
comparativeBeats.text: 1000+ lives transformed, helping founders shift from striving to flow and embody fulfillment.
